title: lotus hispidus subsp. clausonis
intro: Lotus hispidus subsp. clausonis, also known as the Lotus or Kamal, is a plant species that belongs to the Nelumbonaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lotus hispidus subsp. clausonis include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating various skin conditions. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health issues.
